name: Juggling Clubs
flavor: Weighted performance clubs spun in a blur and hurled end over end — a juggler's bread and butter, as happy to crack a skull as to catch the light.

parryProfile.note: A club still in hand parries modestly, batting a blow aside with its weighted head. Once thrown it has left your hand — nothing to guard with. How many clubs a Juggler still holds is governed by the Juggler's engine (Deflect).
